sections.title: Overview
paragraphs: At WilliamEntriken.net, we respect the privacy of our visitors.
This Privacy Policy outlines the types of personal information we collect, how we use it, and the measures we take to protect it.

sections.title: 1. Information Collection
paragraphs: We collect information from you when you submit forms on our website for service requests, inquiries, or other communications.
The types of personal information collected may include name, email address, phone number, and any other information you choose to provide.

sections.title: 2. Use of Information
paragraphs: The information you provide is used solely for responding to your requests and fulfilling the services you require.
We may also use this information to improve our website and services, including reviewing anonymized data to understand how users interact with the site and identify areas for improvement.

sections.title: 3. Data Protection
paragraphs: We implement a variety of security measures to help maintain the safety of your personal information when you submit a request or enter, submit, or access your personal information.

sections.title: 4. Non-disclosure of Information
paragraphs: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personally identifiable information to outside parties.
This does not include trusted third parties who assist in operating our website, conducting our business, or servicing you, so long as those parties agree to keep this information confidential.

sections.title: 5. Anonymized Data
paragraphs: We may use anonymized and aggregated data for research or quality assurance purposes.
This data cannot be used to identify individual users and helps improve services and overall user experience.

sections.title: 6. No Site Tracking
paragraphs: We do not use cookies for analytics or advertising, and we do not track your activity on this site.

sections.title: 7. AI Tools and Third-Party Services
paragraphs: The "Ask your AI" feature is provided only as a convenience to open third-party AI providers through deeplinks.
Any use of third-party providers, including ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity, is solely between you and the applicable provider under that provider's own terms, privacy policy, and practices.
We do not track, store, keep records of, or receive notifications about any conversations you have with those providers.
We are not responsible for your use of those third-party services, including any claims, losses, disputes, outputs, or actions that occur on or because of those services.
We are not sponsored by, affiliated with, or paid by those providers for including these links.

sections.title: 8. Contact Us
paragraphs: If you have any questions or concerns regarding this Privacy Policy, contact us at:

sections.title: 9. Policy Updates
paragraphs: Our privacy practices may be updated from time to time, and any updates will be posted on this page.
